title: isocoma menziesii var. diabolica
intro: Isocoma menziesii var. diabolica, also known as Devil's Gut, is a variety of the Isocoma menziesii plant, a perennial shrub native to the southwestern United States and Mexico. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful for treating wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Isocoma menziesii var. diabolica include reducing inflammation, soothing skin irritations, and aiding in the treatment of colds and coughs. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and salves, which can be made by steeping the leaves and stems in hot water or by combining the plant material with a carrier oil.
